stemHtml: You are a passenger travelling internationally for a holiday in an ICAO contracting state. You have a valid passport and a visa recognized by the state you seek to enter. Upon arrival, according to Annex 9…

options.a: If your passport should expire and you are found inadmissible the state is required to remove you and fly you to your state of residence.
options.b: The state shall not require from you any other document of identification.
options.c: The state may require from you a general declaration signed by the pilot-in-command.
options.d: The state may require you to hold a CMC before granting you access into the state.
